name: PCTEL, Inc.
description: PCTEL, an Amphenol company, is a leading global provider of wireless technology solutions, specializing in the design and manufacture of high-performance antennas and network testing and measurement solutions. The company serves mission-critical industries, including public safety, utilities, transportation, enterprise, and industrial IoT. PCTEL’s products are engineered to ensure reliable wireless connectivity and optimal network performance in complex environments. By providing advanced antenna systems and comprehensive network testing software, PCTEL enables its customers to effectively analyze, design, and optimize their wireless networks, ensuring durability and insight for business-critical applications.
